name: Fehu
upright: Earned wealth, flowing source, cycle of abundance.
essence: Fehu means 'cattle' — portable wealth in antiquity. Symbol of the flowing side of modern wealth.
advice: Today support a material / emotional flow — make a small sharing.

name: Uruz
essence: Uruz is named after the extinct European wild ox — represents wild power.
advice: Today move your body — call your muscles.

name: Thurisaz
essence: Thurisaz is the rune of giants / thorns — connected to Thor's hammer.
advice: Today prepare for a test — may be small, preparation matters.

name: Ansuz
upright: Divine message, meaningful word, academic insight.
essence: Ansuz is Odin's rune — the power of words.
advice: Today pay attention to a message. It is coming — receive.

name: Raidho
essence: Raidho represents conscious rhythm and journey — physical and spiritual.
advice: Today set a rhythm — a morning or evening ritual.

name: Kenaz
upright: Light of insight, discovery, spiritual training.
essence: Kenaz is the torch of learning — the mind that lights the dark.
advice: Today devote 30 minutes to learning a subject.

name: Gebo
essence: Gebo is the meeting of two figures — the reciprocity of the gift.
advice: Today give a gift to someone — words not necessary.

name: Wunjo
reversed: Grief, outer appearance happy, inner sad.
essence: Wunjo is like a flag — indicator of collective happiness.
advice: Today share a joy — to multiply.

name: Hagalaz
essence: Hagalaz is hail — a test from the sky. But when it melts it becomes water, continues to feed.
advice: Today accept a 'natural' disruption. Don't resist.

name: Nauthiz
essence: Nauthiz is like rubbing two woods — fire emerges from scarcity.
advice: Today try a small creativity within a restriction.

name: Isa
reversed: Frozen, unable to flow into life.
essence: Isa is the rune of frozen water — the sanctity of stillness.
advice: Today don't decide quickly. Wait, cold clarity will come.

name: Jera
upright: Completion of natural cycle, harvest, the return of patient labour.
essence: Jera means 'year' — the rune of seasonal cycle.
advice: Today look at a labour that has long been waiting. Is harvest time approaching?

name: Eihwaz
upright: Spiritual endurance, life-death bridge, inner axis.
essence: Eihwaz is the rune of the Yggdrasil world tree — symbol of spiritual continuity.
advice: Today ask which 'spiritual axis' carried you over the years.

name: Perthro
upright: Hidden things emerging, the play of fate.
essence: Perthro is the rune of the vessel from which the dice pour — the invisible play of fate.
advice: Today look for meaning in an event that seems coincidence.

name: Algiz
essence: Algiz is like hands reaching up like the letter elif — protective call.
advice: Today build a conscious 'shield' in an area you need protection.

name: Sowilo
essence: Sowilo is the rune of the sun — symbol of earned success.
advice: Today spend 5 minutes with the sun.

name: Tiwaz
essence: Tiwaz is the rune of Tyr who gave his single hand to Fenrir — sacrificing justice.
advice: Today act clearly on a justice matter. There may be a price.

name: Berkano
essence: Berkano is the rune of the birch tree — symbol of new beginnings and feminine growth.
advice: Today make room for a small renewal — like a sapling.

name: Ehwaz
upright: Progress, secure partnership, flow of motion.
essence: Ehwaz is the union of horse and rider — joint motion.
advice: Today review a partnership of yours. Still in the same direction?

name: Mannaz
upright: Humanity of human, bond with community, being yourself.
essence: Mannaz is two humans together — the common nature of humanity.
advice: Today make room for a community or a person — bond of 'me and you'.

name: Laguz
upright: Wisdom in flow, intuition, feminine consciousness.
essence: Laguz is the rune of water's flow — the language of the unconscious.
advice: Today believe your intuition the first time — without seeking reason.

name: Ingwaz
upright: Hidden potential, inner pregnancy, silent growth.
essence: Ingwaz is the rune of the god Ing — seed of fertility.
advice: Today there may be an 'incubating' intention inside you. Feed it secretly.

name: Dagaz
upright: Enlightenment, sudden change, the start of a new day.
essence: Dagaz is the rune of dawn — moment of great transformation.
advice: Today witness a 'dawn' moment — watch the real dawn or the inner awakening.

name: Othala
essence: Othala is the rune of ancestral inheritance — symbol of blood and earth.
advice: Today think of a 'good inheritance' from your family. Carry with honour.
